name: Jim's Enchilada Casserole
recipeIngredient: Garlic -- as much as you like
2 teaspoons cilantro (add more if you like)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meat, onions, and garlic in oil. Drain fat.
2. Add tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, chili powder, cumin, chilies, and kidney beans to the skillet. Bring mixture to a boil, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Stir in olives and cilantro.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Line a 9 x 13 x 2-inch baking dish with one-third of the corn tortillas.
5. Spread one-third of the meat sauce over the tortillas, followed by one-third of the cheese.
6. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, reserving one-third of the cheese for topping.
7. Cover and bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle the reserved cheese evenly over the casserole.
9. Let the casserole rest for 15 minutes before serving.
10. Serve with salsa and sour cream.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
